commands: Get-ChildItem c:\inetpub\wwwroot\pdfnode -File -Include *.js,*.json,*.config,*.env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 200000 } | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern 'db101|hb101|vets101|eightfoldway|localhost|52\.8\.|http://|https://' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "$(Split-Path $_.Path -Leaf):$($_.LineNumber): $($_.Line.Trim().Substring(0,[Math]::Min(160,$_.Line.Trim().Length)))" }
'--- how does pdfnode run? services with node in path ---'
